content: Wikimedia properties (commons.wikimedia.org, en.wikipedia.org, upload.wikimedia.org) are hostname-blocked at Wikimedia's edge from Claude Code web containers ('x-block-reason: hostname_blocked'). The block keys on the sandbox hostname, not the operator's network — operator VPN changes do not affect it. Alt image APIs (Unsplash, Pexels, Pixabay, Flickr) are reachable from the container but need API keys not in env. Photography sourcing must run Mac-side or with provisioned keys.
